items.title: Lorry sent to repair rural potholes … gets stuck in a pothole
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Elon Musk and Tim Cook among CEOs expected to accompany Trump on China trip
items.dek: A total of 17 US executives are set to join the president on his visit, where he will meet his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping.
items.body: A total of 17 US executives are set to join the president on his visit, where he will meet his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
items.dek: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".
items.body: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".
items.author: IriLine Desk
